description_long: This object is a long-barreled firearm with a robust, metallic frame and a wooden grip, resembling a classic revolver-style shotgun. The barrel is elongated and cylindrical, with a matte dark finish, and the frame features a large, rectangular housing for the cylinder. The grip is ergonomically shaped, made of wood with visible grain and a subtle checkered pattern for improved handling. The trigger guard is metallic and rounded, enclosing a single trigger, and the hammer is exposed at the rear. The overall construction suggests durability, with a mix of metal and wood materials, and the design is reminiscent of 19th-century firearms, suitable for display or use in period urban settings.
description: A long-barreled, revolver-style shotgun with a dark metal frame and a wooden grip, featuring a prominent cylinder and rounded trigger guard. The design combines classic metallic and wooden elements for a robust, vintage appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, circular barrel opening and the alignment of the barrel with the frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the barrel, the large cylinder, wooden grip, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip, the hammer, and the top of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the wooden grip and metallic frame clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
